title: KA KHA ADING A HOIH HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Verse1
Gunpi taang lo bang nuam na'ng hong hilhna in
Dahna tui bangin hong let hi,
Topa hong hilhna pha hi ka kha ading,
Hoih bel hi, kha ading, hoih bel hi.
Chorus
Hoih bel hi, kha ading
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, kha ading
Verse2
Dawi in hong khem a, bawlsiatna hong tun hang,
Ka up ding a thuciam om hi,
Topa Zeisu in ka thanem hong en hi,
Hoih bel hi, kha ading, hoih bel hi
Verse3.
Hong it a, a nuam i ngaihsut ciangin ah,
Kamawh ka khialhna sung panin,
Ka suahtak nading singlamteh tung si hi,
Ka lungsim in ka phat hi Topa.
Verse4
Topa Zeisu tunung ciang hong pai ding hi,
Ka lungkhamna teng bei ding hi,
Topa hih leitungah hong pai dingin ah,
Ka Kha Siangtho ading a pha hi.
